basics.name: Xavier Saliniere
basics.label: Senior Full-Stack Web Developer
basics.summary: Senior Full-Stack Developer with 10+ years of experience in enterprise applications covering security, operations, and analytics domains. At Bell Canada's Operations Center, I built and maintained multiple platforms accelerating operational efficiency and decision-making, including security applications for WAF management, vulnerability tracking, phishing detection, and incident response. I am motivated by creating tools that help people make better decisions, faster. Aspiring to transition into cybersecurity and penetration testing.

work.name: Bell Canada
work.summary: Full-stack development for Bell Canada's Operations Center through Talan contracting, building enterprise security and analytics platforms.
highlights: Developed Insights Platform — AI-powered customer support analytics platform used by 1,100+ users
Built WAF Management Platform — Web Application Firewall policy configuration with side-by-side comparison, virtual server management, and real-time monitoring through telemetry integration
Created Vulnerability Management platform — Tracking and remediation platform for security vulnerabilities across Bell infrastructure
Implemented EDR platform — Event Detection and Response platform for real-time security incident coordination
Built Phisherman — Phishing detection and analysis platform integrating threat intelligence for proactive defense
Developed SLURP — Asset management system with barcode tracking and application status monitoring
Created UCDB — Unified Configuration Database platform with API documentation and field management

work.name: Renault Digital
work.summary: Led frontend development for PRISM through onepoint contracting — modular web application for automotive component definition and validation.
highlights: Built modular architecture enabling different stakeholders (designers, engineers, procurement teams, compliance specialists) to view and validate components according to their specific needs
Established coding standards, architectural decisions, and team development practices
Reduced component validation time and resolved conflicts earlier in the design phase

work.name: Yanport
work.summary: Full-stack development of web applications and services providing tools for real estate professionals.
highlights: Built platform aggregating property listings from multiple sources with advanced search, filtering, report generation, and proposal creation
Completed AngularJS to Angular 5 migration implementing Progressive Web App capabilities and responsive design for mobile and tablet
Developed backend systems with real-time data updates, search optimization, and crawling infrastructure

education.institution: Lycée Léonard de Vinci de Melun

projects.name: Ash
projects.description: P2P field coordination app supporting activism and protest movements with censorship-resistant communication.
highlights: Winner, RealFi Hack 2025 — Resilient Activist Technology track (240 participants)
Peer-to-peer coordination via Waku messaging network with Tor hidden service integration
Offline map downloads and group coordination without centralized infrastructure

projects.name: site
projects.description: Personal website and digital presence with real-time P2P status monitoring on static IPFS hosting.
highlights: Real-time service health monitoring on statically-hosted IPFS site via Waku P2P network
Decentralized deployment pipeline: ENS → IPFS/IPNS with automated CI/CD
Terminal-style interface with command-line navigation and multilingual support

projects.name: lsd
projects.description: shadcn-based implementation of the Logos Design System — a minimalist, accessibility-first component library.
highlights: 39 components with 185+ live examples across 15 releases
Built on React 19 and Radix UI primitives with Tailwind CSS 4
Published as @nipsys/lsd on npm with automated documentation

projects.name: Ethos
projects.description: Web crawler and API aggregating digital rights publications from organizations like EFF, Access Now, and Freedom of the Press Foundation.
highlights: Aggregates content from 7 digital rights organizations in Markdown format
REST API designed for AI agent and algorithm consumption
Planned integration with Codex decentralized storage for immutable archival
